zh.lifeSummary: 當Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz於1347年3月27日出生在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福時，他的父親Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben29歲，母親Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica22歲。他和Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland至少有2個女兒。他去世於1409年1月12日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在美國俄亥俄州梅沙塞莉納斯瓦普 可勒格 其特利。

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Ruprecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz was born on 27 March 1347, in Wrocław, Lower Silesia, Poland, his father, Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben, was 29 and his mother, Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica, was 22. He had at least 2 daughters with Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland. He died on 12 January 1409, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Swamp College Cemetery, Celina, Mercer, Ohio, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz est né le 27 mars 1347, à Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Pologne, son père, Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland. Il est décédé le 12 janvier 1409, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Swamp College Cemetery, Celina, Mercer, Ohio, États-Unis.

de.Swamp College Cemtery., Celina, Mercer,: Swamp College Cemetery, Celina, Mercer, Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz am 27. März 1347 in Wrocław, Niederschlesien, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben 29 und seine Mutter Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica 22. Er hatte mit Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Januar 1409 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Swamp College Cemetery, Celina, Mercer, Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz è nato il il 27 marzo 1347 nel Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland. Morì il 12 gennaio 1409, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Swamp College Cemetery, Celina, Mercer, Ohio, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitzが1347年3月27日にポーランドドルノsルaスキウロクlアウで生まれた時，父Wenceslaus Wenzel Lubenは29歳，母Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnicaは22歳であった。彼はHedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Polandとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1409年1月12日に故郷で61歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国オハイオ州メルサーセライナスワンップ コレッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Swamp College Cemtery., Celina, Mercer,: 미국 오하이오 주 머서 세리나 스와프 콜레지 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz(이)가 1347년 3월 27일 폴란드 도노sa스키 록l아w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 1월 12일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 오하이오 주 머서 세리나 스와프 콜레지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz nasceu em 27 de março de 1347, em Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polônia, seu pai, Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland. Ele faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1409, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Swamp College Cemetery, Celina, Mercer, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Swamp College Cemtery., Celina, Mercer,: свамп колледж кеметири, селина, мирсир, Огайо, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz родился 27 марта 1347 г. в местности рокlав, долноsлaски, Польша, его отцу по имени Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland. Он умер 12 января 1409 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности свамп колледж кеметири, селина, мирсир, Огайо, Соединенные штаты.
